layman_headline: Ethereum shows early signs of a bounce while the market is still scared — a classic buy-the-fear setup.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Fear' mode, which historically is when smart money starts accumulating. Ethereum just printed a strong bullish candlestick pattern called 'Three White Soldiers' — three consecutive days of strong buying. It's sitting just above $1,900 support with a clear path toward $2,000. While Bitcoin recently touched $66K and pulled back, ETH hasn't caught up yet, suggesting room to run if sentiment improves.
layman_action: Consider a measured entry in Ethereum around $1,900, with a firm stop-loss at $1,830. If it breaks above $2,000 with conviction, the next leg toward $2,080+ becomes realistic. Don't go all-in — size the position so losing $70 per ETH won't hurt.
expert_reasoning: ETH presents the strongest asymmetric setup in this cycle. The Three White Soldiers pattern is a high-reliability bullish reversal signal, appearing while the broader trend shows +19.7% 5-day momentum — indicating a potential trend change from the longer downtrend. RSI at 43.85 is neutral with room to run before overbought, and price is above the 20 SMA, confirming near-term bullish structure. The risk/reward to nearest support/resistance is 2.84x, exceeding the 2.0x threshold for quality setups. Fear & Greed at 33 and improving (from 25 yesterday) adds a contrarian tailwind — our signal credibility data shows Fear_Greed has a 67% win rate. BTC dominance at 56.7% is a headwind for alts, but ETH's deep liquidity and institutional flow make it the safest alt play in this environment. CoinTelegraph reporting 9K BTC daily outflows from Binance suggests accumulation phase, which typically lifts ETH in tandem.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.7% continues to suppress altcoin performance — ETH could lag even if BTC recovers
Bitcoin retreated from one-month high on inflation concerns and rising oil prices — macro headwinds could drag all crypto lower
ETH is still in a structural downtrend and below key long-term moving averages — the Three White Soldiers could be a bear market bounce rather than a true reversal
watch_list: BTC price action around $65,000-$66,000 — a breakdown below $64,500 would invalidate the ETH bullish thesis
ETH's ability to hold $1,900 support over the next 48 hours — a close below signals the bounce has failed
Fear & Greed Index trajectory — continued improvement toward 40+ would confirm the sentiment rotation
market_context: Bitcoin pulled back from a one-month high near $66K amid renewed inflation concerns, but Fear & Greed is improving from extreme fear (25) toward neutral (33). The market is in a transitional phase where accumulation signals are emerging but macro headwinds remain.
context_banner: Ethereum's Three White Soldiers pattern at $1,900 support offers a disciplined swing entry as market fear begins to thaw.

key_signals.description: ETH printed a Three White Soldiers bullish reversal pattern with 2.84x risk/reward ratio, the strongest chart setup among all candidates.
ETH RSI at 43.85 is neutral with upside room — not overbought, confirming there's runway for the bullish pattern to play out.
Fear & Greed improved from 25 to 33 (improving trend from weekly avg of 27.4), a historically reliable contrarian buy signal with 67% win rate in our data.
Report of 9,000 BTC daily outflow from Binance suggests institutional accumulation phase, which typically precedes broader market strength including ETH.
Bitcoin broke $66K but multiple signals suggest the rally is atypical — cautioning against chasing BTC and favoring ETH's cleaner technical setup at lower levels.
